1→"""Naming utilities for filenames and worktree names. 2→ 3→This module provides pure utility functions for transforming titles and names 4→into sanitized, filesystem-safe identifiers. All functions are pure (no I/O) 5→and follow LBYL patterns. 6→ 7→Functions that require git operations accept a git_ops parameter via dependency 8→injection to maintain separation from I/O concerns. 9→""" 10→ 11→import hashlib 12→import re 13→import unicodedata 14→from dataclasses import dataclass 15→from datetime import datetime 16→from pathlib import Path 17→ 18→_SAFE_COMPONENT_RE = re.compile(r"[^A-Za-z0-9_/-]+") 19→ 20→# Date suffix format for plan-derived worktree names: -YY-MM-DD-HHMM 21→WORKTREE_DATE_SUFFIX_FORMAT = "%y-%m-%d-%H%M" 22→ 23→# Branch timestamp suffix format: -MM-DD-HHMM (appended after truncation) 24→BRANCH_TIMESTAMP_SUFFIX_FORMAT = "%m-%d-%H%M" 25→ 26→# Regex pattern to detect existing timestamp suffix (MM-DD-HHMM) 27→_TIMESTAMP_SUFFIX_PATTERN = re.compile(r"-\d{2}-\d{2}-\d{4}$") 28→ 29→# Default/fallback titles that extractors return when no real title exists. 30→# These must be rejected so agents provide meaningful plan titles.

134→def validate_pr_title(title: str) -> ValidPrTitle | InvalidPrTitle: 135→ """Validate a plan title against minimum content requirements. 136→ 137→ Agent-facing validation gate. Ensures plan titles have enough meaningful 138→ content before they are used to generate filenames, branch names, or issue 139→ titles. On failure, returns ``InvalidPrTitle`` with actionable feedback 140→ (rules, actual value, examples) so the agent can self-correct and retry. 141→ 142→ Agent-facing callers: 143→ - ``plan_save`` (exec script) 144→ - ``issue_title_to_filename`` (exec script) 145→ 146→ Human-facing counterpart: 147→ ``generate_filename_from_title`` silently transforms arbitrary input 148→ (including emoji-only or accent-heavy strings) into a usable filename, 149→ bypassing this gate entirely. 150→ 151→ Args: 152→ title: The PR title string to validate. 153→ 154→ Returns: 155→ ValidPrTitle if valid, InvalidPrTitle if invalid. 156→ 157→ Examples: 158→ >>> validate_pr_title("Add User Authentication") 159→ ValidPrTitle(title='Add User Authentication') 160→ >>> validate_pr_title("") 161→ InvalidPrTitle(raw_title='', reason='...') 162→ >>> validate_pr_title("🚀🎉") 163→ InvalidPrTitle(raw_title='🚀🎉', reason='...')
... [50 lines omitted] ...

504→def generate_filename_from_title(title: str) -> str: 505→ """Convert title to kebab-case filename with -plan.md suffix. 506→ 507→ Human-facing silent transformation. Accepts arbitrary input (including 508→ emoji-only or accent-heavy strings) and produces a usable filename. 509→ This is the counterpart to ``validate_pr_title``, which is the 510→ agent-facing gate that rejects titles lacking meaningful content. 511→ 512→ ``validate_pr_title`` calls this function internally: if the result 513→ is ``"plan.md"`` (the fallback), the title has no usable content and 514→ the gate rejects it. 515→ 516→ Transformation steps: 517→ 1. Lowercase 518→ 2. Unicode normalization (NFD) 519→ 3. Remove emojis and non-ASCII characters, keep alphanumeric + hyphens 520→ 4. Replace spaces with hyphens 521→ 5. Collapse consecutive hyphens 522→ 6. Strip leading/trailing hyphens 523→ 7. Validate at least one alphanumeric character remains 524→ 8. Append ``"-plan.md"`` 525→ 526→ Returns ``"plan.md"`` if title is empty after cleanup. 527→ 528→ Args: 529→ title: Plan title to convert 530→ 531→ Returns: 532→ Sanitized filename ending with -plan.md 533→
... [10 lines omitted] ...

Excellent! All the renames have been successfully applied. Let me create a summary of the changes:
## Summary
I have successfully renamed all occurrences of `validate_plan_title` to `validate_pr_title` in the file `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/naming.py`.
### Changes Made:
1. **Function definition (line 134):** - Changed: `def validate_plan_title(title: str)` → `def validate_pr_title(title: str)`
2. **Docstring examples (lines 158-163):** - Changed all three docstring examples to call `validate_pr_title()` instead of `validate_plan_title()`
3. **Cross-reference in docstrings (lines 151, 509-512):** - Updated the Args description to reference "PR title" instead of "plan title" - Updated the `generate_filename_from_title()` docstring to reference `validate_pr_title` instead of `validate_plan_title` (both in the main reference on line 509 and internal reference on line 512)
### What Was NOT Changed (as instructed):
- Variable names remain unchanged - The string `"invalid-plan-title"` in the error_type property remains unchanged (this is the error type value, not the function name) - Descriptive prose in docstrings mentioning "plan title" remains unchanged (e.g., "plan titles have enough meaningful content")
